title: Command Cockpit Stage Holo Floor
summary: Turned the remaining dark Command Cockpit Overview stage floor into an animated holo-floor fed by lane progress, quest, proof, gate, and trail state.
proof: Added activeLaneStageHoloFloor so the mounted stage projects lane-state pads without hardcoding one lane.
Scoped the floor to Command Cockpit Overview and kept the base floor hidden in other mounted-stage views.
Added perspective grid, sweep, runner, and pad wake animations with a shallower mobile treatment to avoid extra scroll.
